creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
On Mon, Nov 12, 2001 at 05:40:19PM -0800, John Merryweather Cooper wrote:
> I've got a fix for the gdk-pixbuf that also fixes some other problems:
> 
>     * updates to screem-0.4.1
>     * fixes gdk-pixbuf problem
>     * fixes configure failure to detect gtkhtml
>     * fixes configure failure to detect gnome-print (which results in 
> disabled printing)
>     * enables SSL upload
> 
> Do you (Edwin) want to take over maintainership (I'll send my upgrade 
> patch to you then)?  Otherwise, I'll upload my upgrade/fix as a separate PR.

I'm not an user of screem, I just responded to the problem reported by you.
I'm not a commitor neither, so I don't have the power to solve problems.
Please send it as a pr and so what I do: pray :-)

Edwin
